name: lululemon athletica inc.
sic_description: Apparel & Other Finishd Prods of  Fabrics & Similar Matl
summary: lululemon athletica inc. is a designer and retailer of athletic apparel, footwear, and accessories. The company offers products including yoga pants, leggings, sports bras, tops, shorts, and outerwear targeted at men and women. lululemon operates through company-owned retail stores, e-commerce channels, and outlet locations, with a focus on technical, performance-oriented athletic and lifestyle products.
